name: 高府产房
era_style: 明代晚期官宦府邸产房
description: 紧急布置的产房，产床铺血巾，婴儿襁褓与稳婆药箱置于侧桌。空间紧迫昏暗，红烛与药味弥漫，体现难产早产的生死关头。
visual_reference: Urgent delivery room inside late Ming dynasty mansion, blood-stained birthing bed, swaddled infant bundle and midwife medicine box on side table, dim candlelit interior with tense atmosphere, detailed traditional Chinese medical setting
lighting: 夜间烛光昏黄摇曳，压抑紧迫
emotional_range: 早产难产保母选择到沈词血色尽失泪水
